offer: For property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units, inefficient scheduling causes tenant complaints and potential loss of rental income. We automate maintenance scheduling instead of manual scheduling and tracking of maintenance tasks.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about scheduling tools
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for property managers
try_it: Let users generate work orders and preventive maintenance checklists
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing maintenance data
